Name: Average time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch to be followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch across all process variants ending with Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time from SW-EIC Accept to Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Accept' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Elapsed time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the subsequent Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time until Awaiting Assignment to Batch is performed after RW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'RW-EIC Accept' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total resolution time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch in cases where the prior activity is First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Minimum waiting time to the Awaiting Assignment to Batch following First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch compared to the duration of First Look-Your updates are due in one week within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are due in one week' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Average time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch to occur after First Look-Please submit updates
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Please submit updates' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to the end of the process variant (last recorded event)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and Awaiting Production Checklist
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Awaiting Production Checklist'

Name: Average time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that originated from a major revision cycle versus those from a minor revision cycle
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the end of the case

Name: Time from Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
